name: tailserve
title: TailServe
description: Start and manage an OpenCode server published to your Tailscale tailnet
author: leeweisern

preferences.name: password
preferences.title: Password
preferences.description: Optional password to protect the OpenCode server (passed as OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD)

commands.name: start
commands.title: Start Server
commands.description: Start OpenCode server and publish it to your Tailscale tailnet

commands.name: stop
commands.title: Stop Server
commands.description: Stop the OpenCode server and remove the Tailscale listener

commands.name: status
commands.title: Server Status
commands.description: Check if the OpenCode server is running and copy the URL

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npx @raycast/api@latest publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
